## 1. Scope and Objectives

## 2. Readiness Checklist

| Area | Check | Owner | Status | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Requirements | Scope approved and baselined | <owner> | ☐ | <notes> |
| Architecture | Design reviewed and key decisions recorded | <owner> | ☐ | <notes> |
| Quality | Planned tests executed and exit criteria met | <owner> | ☐ | <notes> |
| Operations | Monitoring, alerting, and runbooks updated | <owner> | ☐ | <notes> |
| Security | Security review completed | <owner> | ☐ | <notes> |
| Data | Migration / rollback plan reviewed | <owner> | ☐ | <notes> |
| Support | Support teams notified and trained | <owner> | ☐ | <notes> |
| Communications | Stakeholder communication ready | <owner> | ☐ | <notes> |
